notFoundDesc: No guideline catalog entry for “{{slug}}”. Try browsing the disease list.
clinicianCta: Are you a clinician? Sign in to see AI suggestions and the literature trail.
clinicianPending: Clinician account pending verification — you can read AI suggestions; rating unlocks once verified.
notListedBadge: Not yet in the public catalog — pending curation.
refreshing: Refreshing now — {{label}}{{elapsed}}. Showing the latest saved results; they may change shortly.
alertConfirmed: Email alerts confirmed for {{disease}}. We will only email when something substantive changes.
synthesisSub: There is no single document. Below is one synthesis combining every source — and under it, a shelf of the sources themselves.
orientationCtaTitle: New to this diagnosis? Start with the orientation map.
orientationCtaSub: The things you don't know to ask about — confirming the diagnosis, doctors who know {{disease}}, guidelines, foundations, trials — in the order you'll need them.
myCaseCtaTitle: Have medical records? See how your case can help.
myCaseCtaSub: Upload results to share with specialists when you choose — and contribute anonymized facts that speed research on new treatments for {{disease}}.
